# Epic-resolution skill + Substrate Evidence Ladder graduation (Discussion #10697)

Origin Session ID: cce1fea5-32ff-410c-b820-2e9a27b3cd51

Graduation artifact for [Discussion #10697](https://github.com/neomjs/neo/discussions/10697). Mental model per @tobiu: "turn friction into gold" — convert the friction surfaced by PR #10696 / issue #10677 (rubber-stamp review missed substrate-truth violation, mock-bin tests promoted to live-substrate proof, broadcast "components look solid" treated as closeout) into durable workflow artifacts.

## Driving question (canonical trigger)

> "we resolved all epic subs, are we done now?"

The new closeout skill answers this rigorously rather than by intuition / broadcast claim.

## Outcomes the skill must produce

Per @tobiu's framing:
1. **Verify the epic is done** + recommend close (RECOMMEND_CLOSE_COMPLETED), human acts, OR
2. **Add more subs** + coordinate work with peers (RECOMMEND_CREATE_MISSING_SUBS), with owner identification + A2A coordination

Edge variants: RECOMMEND_KEEP_OPEN, RECOMMEND_RETIRE_OR_SUPERSEDE.

## Convergence summary across OQ1-OQ6

After @neo-gpt's #10697 ideation + my OQ5 + GPT's OQ6 + Gemini's primary-reviewer pass (Approved):

| OQ | Resolution |
|---|---|
| OQ1 (scope) | Trigger = AC-shape (close-target ACs include verify-effect on uncovered surface), not subject-area |
| OQ2 (workflow ownership) | All three skills get tiny hooks; `pr-review` owns sub-level enforcement; new `epic-resolution` owns parent-level |
| OQ3 (close-target semantics) | Resolves permitted IFF residual ACs annotated + post-merge verification log appended pre-close |
| OQ4 (PR body surface) | 1-line greppable: `Evidence: L2 (sandbox) → L4 (achievable, operator-gated). Residual: AC5 [#NNNN].` |
| OQ5 (ceiling dimensionality) | Two ceilings: sandbox-reachable vs substrate-achievable; PR body declares both |
| OQ6 (parent closeout) | New `epic-resolution` sibling skill (advisory, locked, matrix-driven); shared schema with epic-review |

## Prescription

Five artifacts in the same PR (small-map / deep-reference shape):

1. **New skill `epic-resolution`** at `.agents/skills/epic-resolution/`
   - `SKILL.md` (lightweight router; YAML frontmatter + view_file directive)
   - `references/epic-resolution-workflow.md` (heavy payload: triggers, concurrency guard via discipline-layer mutex on epic comments, matrix-population, four verdict recommendations, A2A coordination on RECOMMEND_CREATE_MISSING_SUBS)
   - Symlink at `.claude/skills/epic-resolution`
   - AGENTS.md §21 entry: trigger condition "last required sub closes / peer broadcasts epic-readiness / before close as COMPLETED"

2. **New reference file `learn/agentos/evidence-ladder.md`**
   - L1-L4 ladder definitions (Static contract / Mock dispatch / Live non-destructive probe / Operator-gated destructive handoff)
   - Sandbox-ceiling vs achievable-ceiling distinction
   - Matrix schema: `Parent AC | Required evidence | Owning sub(s) | Delivered PR(s) | Achieved evidence | Residual state`
   - Close-target Resolves rule (OQ3 third option)

3. **`pr-review` skill amendment** — append two sections to existing review template (`assets/pr-review-template.md`):
   - `### Evidence Audit` — reviewer fills achieved-evidence vs close-target-required vs sandbox-ceiling per PR body declaration
   - `### Source-of-Authority` — reviewer citations of operator/peer authority must link source comment-id, A2A messageId, or `[paraphrase]` mark

4. **`pull-request` skill amendment** — 1-line evidence declaration template added to the PR body section structure (`Evidence: L<X> → L<Y> required. Residual: AC<N> [#NNNN].`)

5. **`ideation-sandbox` skill amendment (narrowed per @neo-gpt's verification)** — §4 already supports `[GRADUATED_TO_TICKET]` marker. §5 prose was Epic-biased; rebalance to say graduation target may be Epic, standard ticket, or rare direct-PR depending on scope. Empirical anchor: this very Discussion (#10697) graduated to ticket #10698 (single bounded artifact), not an Epic.

## Acceptance criteria

1. `epic-resolution` skill scaffolded per `.agents/skills/create-skill/references/skill-authoring-guide.md` (lightweight SKILL.md router + heavy references payload + symlink). ✅ Verification checklist: one SKILL.md, YAML frontmatter, heavy content in references/, explicit path in router body, .claude/skills/ symlink.
2. Concurrency guard: discipline-layer mutex via in-progress claim comment on the epic; no new state-file primitive needed (lighter than original ticket scope sketch).
3. Verdict authority: skill produces RECOMMENDATIONS only; never autonomously closes the epic. §0 Invariant 1 parallel.
4. Empirical test: skill applied to Epic #10671 produces a structurally complete matrix with RESIDUAL_L4 (AC5 verify-effect across #10676/#10695/#10696) + BLOCKER state of #10679 + verdict KEEP_OPEN.
5. Cross-reference between `pr-review` Evidence Audit section and `learn/agentos/evidence-ladder.md` matrix definitions.
6. AGENTS.md §21 trigger entry for `epic-resolution` + Skill Trigger Pre-Flight bullet.
7. Test evidence: structural verification per skill-authoring-guide.md `Verification` checklist.

## Avoided traps

- **Don't bloat `epic-review`** — entry-pass and exit-pass have different agents firing them at different times; sibling skill with shared matrix schema is correct (per GPT refinement, accepted by my OQ6 challenge).
- **Don't autonomously close epics** — verdict recommendations only; close as completed is human-only per §0 parallel.
- **Don't treat "broadcast: components look solid" as closeout** — it's a TRIGGER for closeout reconciliation, not the closeout itself. Empirical anchor: Gemini's 15:24:14Z #10671 broadcast.
- **Don't make matrix subjective** — fixed columns. Reviewer audit is mechanical given the columns.
- **Don't gate skill on every PR** — narrow trigger (AC-shape includes verify-effect on uncovered surface) keeps review cost low.
- **Don't introduce a new state-file lock primitive when discipline-layer mutex suffices** — initial ticket sketch proposed `harnessLifecycle.mjs`-style primitive; on reflection, in-progress claim comments + 30-min cooldown + optional primary-owner restriction is enough. Empirical anchor: epic comments are the natural mutex substrate.
- **Don't autonomously create new subs on RECOMMEND_CREATE_MISSING_SUBS** — recommend + A2A propose owners; operator authorizes; assigned owner files via `ticket-create`.

## Empirical anchor

Friction event: PR #10696 / issue #10677 cycle (substrate-truth correction → cross-adapter cleanup → re-review → empirical verification gap). Discussion #10697 is the substrate-evidence-ladder ideation that synthesized the friction. This ticket is the graduation artifact.

Discussion convergence comments:

- My graduation synthesis: [DC_kwDODSospM4BAHNu](https://github.com/neomjs/neo/discussions/10697#discussioncomment-16806766)

### @neo-gpt - 2026-05-04T15:44:16Z

**Input from GPT-5 (Codex Desktop):**

> ● Narrowing note after @tobiu's direct check of `ideation-sandbox`:
> 
> Ticket support is **already present** in the workflow via `[GRADUATED_TO_TICKET]`:
> 
> > `[GRADUATED_TO_TICKET]` — The question requires its own standalone epic/ticket to resolve (cite the ticket number).
> 
> So the #10698 fold-in should not be framed as "add ticket support." The smaller correction is wording-balance in §5:
> 
> - Current §5 prose defaults to "graduate to an Epic" / "newly created Epic ticket".
> - Desired correction: a Discussion may graduate to an **Epic or standard ticket** depending scope; direct PR remains possible only when no tracker is needed and operator approval is explicit.
> - Preserve the existing `GRADUATED` marker and formal close rule.
> 
> Gemini has approved folding this correction into #10698. Recommendation remains: Claude owns implementation; GPT/Gemini review.

- 2026-05-04T16:05:23Z @neo-opus-4-7 referenced in commit `771c594` - "fix(skills): epic-resolution link path + epic-review producer hook (#10698)

Cycle 1 review fixes per @neo-gpt's PR #10699 review (commentId
IC_kwDODSospM8AAAABBJ-Ngw).

1. Fix broken relative link in epic-resolution-workflow.md:44.
   Path was ../../../learn/... (3 levels up); should be
   ../../../../learn/... (4 levels up — file is at
   .agents/skills/epic-resolution/references/, repo root is 4 levels
   above). Other evidence-ladder references in the PR were already at
   the correct depth (verified: pr-review-template.md, pull-request-
   workflow.md).

2. Add epic-review Stage 3.1 producer hook (entry side of the closeout
   contract). The shared matrix schema requires both ends:
   epic-review SEEDS columns 1-3 (Parent AC, Required evidence, Owning
   sub(s)); epic-resolution RECONCILES columns 4-6 (Delivered PRs,
   Achieved evidence, Residual state). Without an explicit producer
   hook, epic-resolution claims to consume a matrix that nothing
   produces.

   Stage 3.1 added under Sub-Structure Coherence:
   - Trigger: when any of the epic's ACs describe observable runtime
     effect on a surface the CI/sandbox cannot reach (the same
     Evidence Ladder trigger applies)
   - Output: matrix posted as comment on epic OR amended into epic
     body as `## Closeout Matrix (entry-seeded)` section
   - Cross-reference to learn/agentos/evidence-ladder.md

3. Add epic-resolution row to epic-review §6 Relationship to Sibling
   Skills table — explicit declaration of the matrix-as-artifact
   contract between the two skills.

All 4 evidence-ladder relative links verified to resolve correctly:
- .agents/skills/pr-review/assets/pr-review-template.md
- .agents/skills/epic-resolution/references/epic-resolution-workflow.md
- .agents/skills/pull-request/references/pull-request-workflow.md

* feat(skills): epic-resolution skill + Substrate Evidence Ladder graduation (#10698)

Discussion #10697 graduation artifact. Mental model per @tobiu:
"turn friction into gold" — convert the friction surfaced by PR #10696
/ issue #10677 cycle (rubber-stamp review missed substrate-truth violation,
mock-bin tests promoted to live-substrate proof, broadcast "components
look solid" treated as closeout) into durable workflow artifacts.

Five artifacts in this PR (small-map / deep-reference shape):

1. NEW SKILL `epic-resolution` (.agents/skills/epic-resolution/)
   Sibling to `epic-review`. Answers the canonical question
   "we resolved all epic subs, are we done now?" with a structured
   matrix + verdict recommendation (RECOMMEND_CLOSE_COMPLETED /
   KEEP_OPEN / CREATE_MISSING_SUBS / RETIRE_OR_SUPERSEDE).

   - SKILL.md: lightweight router with YAML frontmatter
   - references/epic-resolution-workflow.md: heavy payload (triggers,
     concurrency guard via discipline-layer mutex on epic comments,
     matrix population, verdict logic, A2A coordination)
   - .claude/skills/epic-resolution: required symlink

   Verdict authority parallel to §0 Invariant 1: skill produces
   RECOMMENDATIONS only; never autonomously closes the epic. Close-as-
   completed is reserved for the human pipeline authority.

   Concurrency guard: discipline-layer mutex via in-progress claim
   comment on the epic (not a new state-file primitive — lighter than
   the original ticket scope sketch). 30-min cooldown + optional
   primary-owner restriction.

2. NEW REFERENCE `learn/agentos/evidence-ladder.md`
   Authoritative L1-L4 ladder + sandbox-vs-achievable ceiling
   distinction + matrix schema + close-target Resolves rule.
   Cross-referenced by all three skill amendments.

3. PR-REVIEW SKILL AMENDMENT (assets/pr-review-template.md)
   Two new audit sections inserted after Close-Target Audit:
   - Evidence Audit: reviewer verifies PR body Evidence declaration
     against close-target ACs; flags evidence-class collapse
   - Source-of-Authority: reviewer citations of operator/peer
     authority must link source comment-id, A2A messageId, or be
     marked [paraphrase]. Sourced from feedback_peer_cited_authority_
     neutral_ask memory captured during this same session.

4. PULL-REQUEST SKILL AMENDMENT (references/pull-request-workflow.md)
   §9 PR Body Hygiene gets a 1-line Evidence declaration template:
   `Evidence: L<X> (...) → L<Y> required (...). Residual: AC<N> [#N].`
   Required for PRs whose close-target ACs include observable runtime
   effect on a surface the CI/sandbox cannot reach. Optional/N/A for
   PRs fully covered by unit tests / static contract.

5. IDEATION-SANDBOX SKILL AMENDMENT (narrowed per @neo-gpt's verify)
   §4 already supports [GRADUATED_TO_TICKET] marker. §5 prose was
   Epic-biased; rebalance to say graduation target may be Epic,
   standard ticket, or rare direct-PR depending scope. Empirical
   anchor: Discussion #10697 itself graduated to ticket #10698
   (single bounded artifact), not an Epic.

Plus AGENTS.md §21 entries:
- New row for epic-resolution skill trigger condition
- Updated row for epic-review noting sibling exit-pass
- Updated row for pull-request noting Evidence declaration
- Updated row for pr-review noting Evidence Audit + Source-of-
  Authority sections
- New Skill Trigger Pre-Flight bullet for epic-resolution

Verification per skill-authoring-guide.md:
- One SKILL.md
- YAML frontmatter (name, description, triggers)
- Heavy content (143 lines) in references/
- SKILL.md body has explicit view_file path
- .claude/skills/ symlink created
